title: Systems Build Plan
subtitle: Connecting the Infrastructure to Execute the Marceau Execution System
author: William Marceau | Marceau Solutions
content_markdown:
## The Gap: Built vs. Connected

You have 117 Python scripts, 38 active n8n workflows, a three-agent system, and infrastructure that most agencies would charge $50K to build. But here's the problem the audit revealed:

**Infrastructure completion: 95%. Revenue-generating connections: 30%.**

The pipes exist. They're just not plumbed together. This document maps exactly what to build, in what order, to turn your infrastructure into the operating system described in the Execution Plan.

---

## What Exists vs. What the Execution Plan Requires

| Execution Plan Need | What Exists | Gap | Build Priority |
|---|---|---|---|
| Rule of 100 outreach tracking | No outreach tracker | Need Google Sheet + daily logging | WEEK 1 |
| Cold email via Apollo.io sequences | Apollo setup script exists | Need Apollo.io sequences configured | WEEK 1 |
| Warm outreach scripts | `warm_outreach_sms.py` exists | Need AI services version (not just fitness) | WEEK 1 |
| Loom demo library | Nothing | Need recording + Loom account | WEEK 1 (manual) |
| AI Services one-pager PDF | `branded_pdf_engine.py` ready | Need offer data + generate PDF | WEEK 1 |
| Naples prospect list | Apollo setup script exists | Need Apollo.io account + list build | WEEK 1 |
| Discovery call booking | Calendly exists | Need AI services Calendly link | WEEK 1 |
| Proposal auto-generation | Branded PDF engine ready | Need proposal template | WEEK 1 |
| YouTube channel + publishing | YouTube creator MCP (stub) | Need channel setup + upload workflow | WEEK 2 |
| Content batch filming pipeline | Video tools exist (5+ scripts) | Need filming SOP + edit workflow | WEEK 2 |
| Instagram/TikTok scheduling | Creator MCPs (stubs) | Need API keys + n8n workflows | WEEK 3 |
| Weekly scorecard automation | `revenue_analytics.py` exists | Need scorecard Sheet + weekly digest | WEEK 2 |
| Lead scoring engine | `lead_manager.py` (760 lines, unused) | Need to wire to n8n + scoring logic | WEEK 3 |
| Group coaching platform | Challenge workflows exist | Need cohort structure + delivery | MONTH 2 |
| $19.99 digital product | `workout_plan_generator.py` exists | Need Gumroad/Stripe product page | MONTH 2 |
| Fitness landing page | Website builder exists | Need offer page + Stripe checkout | WEEK 2 |

---

## BUILD PHASE 1: The Outreach Machine (Days 1-3)

This is the #1 priority. Without this, the Rule of 100 is just a concept.

### Build 1A: Outreach Tracking Sheet
**What**: Google Sheet to track daily outreach volume, replies, meetings, and pipeline
**Why**: Hormozi Rule of 100 requires measurement. Can't improve what you don't track.
**Tabs needed**:
- **Daily Outreach Log**: Date, Channel (warm/cold/in-person), Count, Replies, Meetings Booked
- **Prospect List**: Name, Business, Phone, Email, Status, Last Contact, Notes
- **Pipeline**: Prospect Name, Stage (Lead/Meeting/Proposal/Closed), Value, Next Action
- **Weekly Scorecard**: Auto-calculated from Daily Log

**Build time**: 30 minutes
**Wires to**: Daily Operations Digest (n8n can pull scorecard numbers)

### Build 1B: AI Services Offer One-Pager
**What**: Branded PDF using `branded_pdf_engine.py` with the productized service menu from the Execution Plan
**Why**: You need a leave-behind for Naples in-person visits and an attachment for cold emails
**Content**: The 5-tier menu (Lead Engine → Full Stack), pricing, guarantee, testimonial placeholder
**Build time**: 20 minutes (data exists in execution plan, just needs PDF generation)

### Build 1C: AI Services Proposal Template
**What**: Branded PDF template that auto-fills with prospect name, their pain point, your solution, timeline, and pricing
**Why**: Saraev's highest-converting tactic: personalized proposals in under 5 minutes
**Build time**: 45 minutes (extend branded_pdf_engine with proposal template)

### Build 1D: Cold Email Sequencing (Apollo.io)
**What**: Apollo.io email sequences configured with cold email templates
**Why**: Saraev system: 50-100 cold emails/day at 1-3% reply rate = 1-3 meetings/day. Apollo.io handles both prospecting (Build 1E) AND email sequencing in one platform — no need for a separate tool.
**Sequences**: The 3-email sequence from the Execution Plan, loaded into Apollo.io Sequences
**Build time**: 45 minutes (sequences only — Apollo.io account already set up in Build 1E)
**Note**: Apollo.io free tier includes email sequencing. No additional cost beyond the prospecting tool you already need.

### Build 1E: Apollo.io Prospect List
**What**: Apollo.io free tier account + Naples business list
**Why**: Cold outreach needs targets. Apollo provides verified emails and company data.
**Filters**: Naples FL, 5-50 employees, industries: home services, med spas, dental, real estate, restaurants
**Build time**: 1 hour (account + first list of 200-500 prospects)

### Build 1F: Calendly AI Services Link
**What**: New Calendly event type for AI Services Discovery Calls (15 min)
**Why**: Every outreach message needs a booking link. Speed to lead wins.
**Build time**: 10 minutes
**Wires to**: `calendly_monitor.py` already tracks bookings

---

## BUILD PHASE 2: Content Production Pipeline (Days 4-7)

### Build 2A: YouTube Channel Setup
**What**: YouTube channel configured with Marceau Solutions branding
**Why**: Humiston model requires consistent publishing platform
**Setup**: Channel art, about section, links to website + socials, upload defaults
**Build time**: 30 minutes (manual)

### Build 2B: Fitness Content Landing Page
**What**: Landing page on marceausolutions.com for the fitness offer
**Why**: Every video needs a CTA. "Link in bio" needs to go somewhere.
**Content**: Story hook, offer tiers, lead magnet download, Calendly booking
**Build time**: 1-2 hours (use website-builder tools)
**Wires to**: Lead-Magnet-Capture workflow (already active)

### Build 2C: Weekly Scorecard Automation
**What**: n8n workflow that compiles weekly metrics and sends summary
**Why**: The Execution Plan scorecard (outreach volume, meetings, content published, revenue) needs to be automatic
**Pattern**:
- Trigger: Cron Sunday 8pm ET
- Pull: Outreach Log (sum week), YouTube analytics, Stripe revenue, PT Tracker stats
- Format: Branded summary
- Send: Email + Telegram to William
**Build time**: 1.5 hours
**Wires to**: Daily Operations Digest (extend existing workflow)

### Build 2D: Content Queue Sheet + Planning Workflow
**What**: Google Sheet for content planning + n8n workflow for weekly idea generation
**Why**: Humiston model requires 2 videos/week + 4-5 shorts. Needs a system, not willpower.
**Tabs**: Content Queue (idea, status, platform, scheduled date), Asset Library (B-roll index), Publishing Log
**n8n Pattern**: Friday 4pm → Claude API generates 5-7 ideas from Hormozi weekly themes → populate Sheet → Telegram notification
**Build time**: 1.5 hours

---

## BUILD PHASE 3: Closing the Coaching Automation Gaps (Week 2)

The coaching client journey is 85% automated. These 4 builds close it to 98%.

### Build 3A: Wednesday Mid-Week Tip Automation
**What**: n8n workflow — Cron Wednesday 6pm ET → rotate through `data/midweek-tips.json` (30 tips) → SMS per active client
**Why**: Currently manual CLI. Removes 5 min/week and ensures consistency even on low-energy days.
**Pattern**: Clone Coaching-Monday-Checkin, swap template to `coaching_midweek_tip`, add tip rotation counter
**Build time**: 30 minutes

### Build 3B: Tuesday Non-Responder Follow-Up
**What**: n8n workflow — Cron Tuesday 8am ET → check if Monday SMS got a reply → if not, send `coaching_no_response`
**Why**: Follow-up is where coaching retention lives. Hormozi: "Most people quit after 1 message."
**Pattern**: Query PT Tracker for Monday check-in status → cross-reference Twilio inbound → send if no reply
**Build time**: 45 minutes

### Build 3C: Sunday Program Generation + Upload
**What**: n8n workflow — Cron Sunday 5pm ET → call `workout_plan_generator.py` per client → upload to Drive → SMS notification
**Why**: Removes 30-45 min of William's Sunday evening. Programs generate even on treatment days.
**Build time**: 1 hour

### Build 3D: Month-End Review Auto-Scheduler
**What**: n8n workflow — Cron last Monday of month → SMS with Calendly booking link → 48h reminder if not booked
**Why**: Progress reviews drive retention. Automation ensures they never slip.
**Build time**: 45 minutes

---

## BUILD PHASE 4: Cross-Tower Connections (Week 3)

### Build 4A: Unified Lead Router
**What**: n8n workflow that sits behind ALL 7 lead capture workflows and routes leads to the right tower
**Why**: Currently, leads from different forms go to different sheets with no unified view or routing logic.
**Pattern**: Any lead capture → Lead Router → score intent (fitness/AI services/content) → route to appropriate nurture sequence → log to unified Leads sheet
**Build time**: 2 hours
**Impact**: Single source of truth for all leads across all towers

### Build 4B: Prospect Batch Outreach Trigger
**What**: n8n workflow — Cron Monday 8am → pull prospects from Sheet (status: not contacted) → trigger Fitness-SMS-Outreach
**Why**: The outreach workflows EXIST but have no automated trigger. This is the missing ignition switch.
**Build time**: 1.5 hours
**Wires to**: Fitness-SMS-Outreach + Fitness-SMS-Followup-Sequence (both already active)

### Build 4C: Content Syndication (Fitness → Social)
**What**: When fitness content is created for coaching, automatically queue it for social media posting
**Why**: One piece of content should serve multiple purposes. Coaching tips → YouTube videos → Instagram reels → TikTok shorts
**Build time**: 2 hours

### Build 4D: Activate lead_manager.py
**What**: Wire the existing 760-line `lead_manager.py` to n8n form webhooks
**Why**: This script is fully built but never activated. It handles lead scoring, routing, and lifecycle management.
**Build time**: 1 hour (mostly configuration, code exists)

---

## BUILD PHASE 5: AI Services Client Delivery (Week 3-4)

When you close your first AI services client, you need to deliver. This is the delivery infrastructure.

### Build 5A: AI Services Onboarding Workflow
**What**: Clone Coaching-Payment-Welcome pattern for AI services clients
**Pattern**: Stripe payment → welcome email with onboarding questionnaire → create project in WebDev Tracker → Telegram notification → kickoff Loom recording request
**Build time**: 1 hour (clone + modify existing pattern)

### Build 5B: Client Demo Instance Generator
**What**: Script that spins up a demo n8n workflow instance showing the client's specific automation
**Why**: Saraev's insight: show don't tell. A live demo of THEIR lead capture system converts better than any pitch deck.
**Build time**: 2 hours

### Build 5C: Monthly Client Report Generator
**What**: Branded PDF showing client's automation performance (leads captured, follow-ups sent, response rates)
**Why**: Proves ongoing value. Justifies the monthly retainer. Prevents churn.
**Pattern**: Pull client's workflow stats → generate branded PDF → email automatically on 1st of month
**Build time**: 1.5 hours
**Wires to**: branded_pdf_engine.py (already has report templates)

---

### Week 3 (March 31 - April 4): Cross-Tower + AI Services Delivery

**Week 3 Total**: ~8.5 hours of building

---

## What This Unlocks

Once all three weeks of builds are complete, here's what your daily operating system looks like:

### Monday (HIGH ENERGY — Outreach Day)
**Automated before you wake up**:
- Dashboard metrics compiled (n8n Daily Operations Digest)
- Prospect batch outreach triggered (Fitness-Weekly-Prospect-Batch)
- Content ideas from Friday planning ready for review

**You do**:
- Review dashboard (5 min)
- Execute Rule of 100 outreach (2 hours — tracked in Outreach Sheet)
- Build Loom demos + proposals for warm leads (2 hours)
- Sales study (1 hour)
- AI services delivery work (2 hours)

### Tuesday (HIGH ENERGY — Content + Outreach)
**Automated before you wake up**:
- Non-responder follow-ups sent (Coaching-Tuesday-Followup)
- Outreach reply notifications in Telegram

**You do**:
- Execute Rule of 100 outreach (2 hours)
- Batch film 2-3 YouTube videos (2.5 hours)
- Edit + schedule content (1.5 hours)
- Follow up on outreach replies (1 hour)

### Wednesday (MEDIUM ENERGY — In-Person + Prospecting)
**Automated at 6pm**:
- Mid-week tip SMS sent to all coaching clients

**You do**:
- Cold email list building (1.5 hours)
- Naples in-person visits — 5 businesses (2 hours)
- Record Loom proposals (1 hour)
- Lead nurturing + follow-ups (1.5 hours)
- Sales objection study (1 hour)

### Thursday (HIGH ENERGY — Content + Fitness)
**Automated**:
- Content queue images generated (Content-Batch-Image-Gen)

**You do**:
- Execute Rule of 100 outreach (2 hours)
- Film Day #2 — YouTube + Shorts (2.5 hours)
- Edit, post, schedule content (1 hour)
- Fitness offer development (1.5 hours)

### Friday (MEDIUM ENERGY — Review Day)
**Automated at 4pm**:
- Content planning for next week generated (Content-Weekly-Plan)

**You do**:
- Outreach — 50 actions (1.5 hours)
- Weekly scorecard review (1 hour — data auto-compiled)
- AI services delivery (2 hours)
- Weekly review + next week planning (1 hour)
- Peptide research (1 hour)

### Saturday (LOW ENERGY)
**Automated — everything runs without you**:
- n8n workflows continue (lead capture, nurture sequences, follow-ups)
- Clawdbot handles Telegram inquiries
- Scheduled content publishes automatically

### Sunday
**Automated at 5pm**:
- Weekly programs generated + uploaded for coaching clients
- Program notification SMS sent

**You do**:
- Weekly scorecard review + planning (1.5 hours)
- Content scheduling for the week (1 hour)

---

## The Meta-Play

Every system you build for YOURSELF becomes a system you can SELL to AI services clients.

- Your outreach tracking sheet → template for client lead tracking
- Your content pipeline → template for client content automation
- Your coaching automation → template for other coaches
- Your scorecard → template for client reporting

Saraev's productized service model in action: build once, sell many times. Your business IS the demo.

---

## Systems Inventory After Build Completion

| Category | Before | After | Automation % |
|---|---|---|---|
| Lead Generation | 5 capture forms, no outreach automation | Full capture + cold email + warm outreach + prospect batching | 60% → 90% |
| Content Pipeline | X/Twitter only, manual everything else | Multi-platform scheduling, AI-assisted planning, batch production | 20% → 75% |
| Sales CRM | Manual Sheets tracking | Unified lead router, scoring, pipeline tracking, proposal automation | 40% → 80% |
| Client Delivery (Fitness) | Mon check-in automated, rest manual | Full week automated (Mon-Sun), program gen, review scheduling | 85% → 98% |
| Client Delivery (AI Services) | Nothing | Onboarding, demo generation, monthly reporting | 0% → 70% |
| Analytics | Revenue report weekly, manual scorecard | Auto-compiled scorecard, cross-tower metrics, content analytics | 50% → 85% |
| Cross-Tower | Isolated towers | Unified lead routing, content syndication, referral automation | 10% → 60% |

**Total build time across 3 weeks: ~24.5 hours**
**Manual time saved per week at scale: 8-12 hours**
**ROI ratio: Every hour of building saves 20+ hours over 6 months**

---

## Start Tomorrow

Day 1 builds take 1 hour total:
1. Create the Outreach Tracking Sheet (30 min)
2. Generate the AI Services One-Pager PDF (20 min)
3. Create the Calendly booking link (10 min)

Then open the calendar, look at the OUTREACH BLITZ block at 7:30am, and send your first 50 messages.

The systems support you. They don't replace the work. But they make sure that on your worst days, the machine keeps running — and on your best days, you're focused on the highest-leverage activity: talking to people who need what you've built.
